tokens.text: stalks targets then pounces to attack

fields.title: Interest Time
fields.description: The amount of time the mob will be interested before pouncing. This happens when the mob is within range of pouncing

fields.title: Leap Distance
fields.description: The distance in blocks the mob jumps in the direction of its target

fields.title: Leap Height
fields.description: The height in blocks the mob jumps when leaping at its target

fields.title: Max Stalk Dist
fields.description: The maximum distance away a target can be before the mob gives up on stalking

fields.title: Pounce Max Dist
fields.description: The maximum distance away from the target in blocks to begin pouncing at the target

fields.title: Set Persistent
fields.description: Allows the actor to be set to persist upon targeting a player

fields.title: Stalk Speed
fields.description: The movement speed in which you stalk your target

fields.title: Strike Dist
fields.description: The max distance away from the target when landing from the pounce that will still result in damaging the target

fields.title: Stuck Time
fields.description: The amount of time the mob will be stuck if they fail and land on a block they can be stuck on

fields.title: Priority
fields.description: As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

description: Allows a mob to stalk a target, then once within range pounce onto a target, on success the target will be attacked dealing damage defined by the attack component. On failure, the mob will risk getting stuck
title: Stalk And Pounce On Target Behavior
